SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances for Thursday, OCT-04-2012: Jacob Harker, Esq. for Respondent Sean DeVries, also present; Dino M. Zaffina, President and CEO of Southern California Darts Assn., Inc. appears for Appellent California Darts Association, Inc. The Clerk administers the oath, and both sides sign Stipulation and Order to Use Judge Pro Tem.

Pro Tem Judge Elliott A. Myles hears oral statements presented by both sides and reviews documentary evidence that is presented to the Court
